Health_Department_Name: Mariposa County Health and Human Services
Program_Description: Healthy Families America (HFA) is one of the leading family support and evidence-based home visiting programs in the United States.
Target_Population: Families with newborns up to 3 months; stress and risk-factor screening at birth

Health_Department_Name: Mariposa County Health and Human Services
Program_Description: Healthy Families America is a national home visiting program focused on early childhood relational health, partnering with families to help children thrive.
Target_Population: Families with newborns up to 3 months; expectant parents and families with children from birth through age 3.

Health_Department_Name: Mariposa County Health and Human Services
Program_Description: A free program for eligible pregnant women & families with children up to 5 years old. A registered nurse will visit your home to provide information on many topics & answer your questions.
Target_Population: Eligible pregnant women and families with children up to 5 years old
